problem id: 63cc40f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01110011 -> 00011011
  00001011 -> 00011000
  11011110 -> 01110110
  11110111 -> 00111111
  10001011 -> 00011100
  10101000 -> 01000101
  10011001 -> 10001100
  11111111 -> 00111111

query: 11001111
predicted answer: 00111110
